DataGap.description: A single data gap record — emitted when expected data is absent or stale.

description.description: What data is missing or stale
description.title: Description

remediation.description: How the user can resolve this gap
remediation.title: Remediation

can_continue.description: Whether the skill/workflow can produce useful output despite this gap
can_continue.title: Can Continue

source.description: Which upstream skill or API caused the gap
source.title: Source

DataGap.title: DataGap

text.default: This artifact is produced by TraderMonty, a decision-support and trading-process toolkit. It is NOT financial advice, investment advisory, a trading signal, or a guarantee of profitability. All trading decisions, position sizing, risk management, and broker execution decisions remain solely the user's responsibility. Review all outputs manually before acting.
text.title: Text

ManualReviewStatus.description: Lifecycle state of the human review gate for an artifact.
ManualReviewStatus.title: ManualReviewStatus

ReviewerRole.description: Role of the reviewer who completed or waived the review.
ReviewerRole.title: ReviewerRole

input_artifact_ids.description: artifact_ids consumed as inputs by this step
input_artifact_ids.title: Input Artifact Ids

output_artifact_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of artifacts produced by this step: {artifact_id: sha256}
output_artifact_hashes.title: Output Artifact Hashes

description:
Record of a single workflow execution session.

Saved to state/workflow-runs/<run_id>.json by the workflow runner.
Never contains trade execution instructions.

skill_id.description: ID of the skill that produced this artifact
skill_id.title: Skill Id

data_sources_used.description: APIs, CSVs, or other sources consumed
data_sources_used.title: Data Sources Used

data_gaps.description: All detected data gaps; empty list = no gaps detected
data_gaps.title: Data Gaps

assumptions.description: Explicit assumptions made due to missing or inferred data
assumptions.title: Assumptions

confidence.description: HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW — reflects data completeness and signal quality
confidence.title: Confidence

manual_review_required.description: Workflow runs require human review at each decision gate
manual_review_required.title: Manual Review Required

manual_review_status.description: Review lifecycle: PENDING → IN_REVIEW → APPROVED / REJECTED. WAIVED is permitted only for non-trade artifacts (e.g., data quality reports). Promotion-blocking: outputs with status PENDING or IN_REVIEW must not be acted upon.

reviewer.description: Name or identifier of the human reviewer who completed or waived the review
reviewer.title: Reviewer

reviewed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the review was completed or waived
reviewed_at.title: Reviewed At

review_notes.description: Reviewer's notes, decision rationale, or conditions attached to the approval
review_notes.title: Review Notes

reviewer_role.description: Role of the reviewer who completed or waived the review

author_id.description: ID of the artifact author; used to prevent self-review
author_id.title: Author Id

dual_review_required.description: Whether a second independent reviewer is required
dual_review_required.title: Dual Review Required

next_actions.description: Suggested next steps for the user
next_actions.title: Next Actions

workflow_version.description: Manifest version of the workflow at run-start time (from manifest 'version' field)
workflow_version.title: Workflow Version

run_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the run was created (alias for started_at; always populated for reproducibility audit trails)
run_timestamp.title: Run Timestamp

operator.description: Name or identifier of the operator who started the run
operator.title: Operator

skill_versions.description: Snapshot of skill versions at run-start time: {skill_id: version}
skill_versions.title: Skill Versions

artifact_schema_versions.description: Snapshot of artifact schema versions at run-start time: {artifact_type: schema_version}
artifact_schema_versions.title: Artifact Schema Versions

input_artifact_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of key input artifacts: {artifact_id: sha256}
input_artifact_hashes.title: Input Artifact Hashes

output_artifact_hashes.description: SHA-256 hashes of key output artifacts: {artifact_id: sha256}
output_artifact_hashes.title: Output Artifact Hashes

artifact_ids.description: artifact_ids of all artifacts produced during this run
artifact_ids.title: Artifact Ids

decision_gate_log.description: Log of all decision gate answers
decision_gate_log.title: Decision Gate Log

title: WorkflowRun
